SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.gossip.interfaces

Interface GossipMessageI

All Superinterfaces:
Serializable
All Known Subinterfaces:
EmitterAwareGossipMessageI
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractGossipMessage, CreateChannelGossipMessage, DestroyChannelGossipMessage, ModifyAuthorisedUsersGossipMessage, ModifyServiceClassGossipMessage, PublishGossipMessage, RegisterGossipMessage, UnregisterGossipMessage
public interface GossipMessageI extends Serializable
The interface GossipMessageI declares the signatures of methods that must be implemented by messages exchanged among the participants in the gossip protocol.

Description

In a gossip protocol, participants exchange gossip messages to propagate information through an overlay network. Such messages have an emitter, which URI is stored in the message, a message URI to distinguish messages from each others and a time stamp. Knowing the emitter, a receiver can avoid to send it back a message just received from it. The message URI allows participants to recognise messages that they have already processed and resent if necessary, hence avoiding to flood the overlay network with messages that have already circulated through it and its neighbours. Finally, the time stamp is useful to manage the memory of already processed messages that can be cleaned up of old messages information that cannot show up again despite the unpredictable nature of the gossip message propagation algorithm.

The emitter URI is not meant to keep track of the initial participant that introduced the message in the overlay network but rather to give a one-step capability not to come back from a receiver to the immediate resender. Therefore, whenever a message is resent by a participant, this participant puts its own URI in the message before sending it to its neighbour. The method copyWithNewEmitterURI is meant to help this process by creating a shallow copy of the message changing only the URI of the emitter.

Invariants 

 invariant      true        // no more invariant

Created on : 2026-02-12

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    GossipMessageI
    copyWithNewEmitterURI(String newGossipEmitterURI)
    shallow copy this gossip message with the new emitter URI newGossipEmitterURI.

    return the URI of the gossip protocol message.

    return the time stamp marking the creation of the message.

  • Method Details

    • gossipMessageURI

      String gossipMessageURI()
      return the URI of the gossip protocol message.

      Contract 

       pre    true        // no precondition.
 post   return != null && !return.isEmpty()
      Returns:
      the URI of the gossip protocol message.

    • timestamp

      Instant timestamp()
      return the time stamp marking the creation of the message.

      Contract 

       pre    true        // no precondition.
 post   return != null
      Returns:
      the time stamp marking the creation of the message.

    • copyWithNewEmitterURI

      GossipMessageI copyWithNewEmitterURI(String newGossipEmitterURI)
      shallow copy this gossip message with the new emitter URI newGossipEmitterURI.

      Contract 

       pre    newEmitterURI != null && !newEmitterURI.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      newGossipEmitterURI - new emitter URI for this gossip message.
      Returns:
      a shallow copy of this message with a new emitter URI.
